title: ANALYTICAL METHOD DEVELOPMENT AND VALIDATION FOR THE ESTIMATION OF VILDAGLIPTIN IN BULK AND ITS DOSAGE FORM USING UV SPECTROPHOTOMETER
author: P. V. Prasad*, K. Divya, M.V. Ramana, A. Krishnaveni, J. Vinay, M. Mahadeswar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A simple, rapid, precise and economical Analytical method development has been developed for quantitative vildagliptin in manufactured tablet formulation. The stock solution and subsequent dilution of vildagliptin was done in 0.1% NaOH. Solution of vildagliptin in 0.1% NaOH showed absorption maxima at 216.00 nm. The drug obeyed Beers-Lamberts Law in the concentration range of 10-100 μg/mL with Coefficient of correlation (R2) was 0.997. The standard the method can be adopted in routine analysis of vildagliptin in bulk and tablet dosage form.
